REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (30 Rebecca Lane)
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for and with Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $330,000.00 to Zhi Hua and Pei Cheng based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 9, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). The proceeds from the sale are to be deposited in a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account was set for December 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (30 Rebecca Lane)
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (30 Rebecca Lane)
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Smith for and with Glenn Ford.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to October 9, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to republish notice. The Court shortened notice to 5 days and will allow one time publication.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
